The '''Karakan''' were a group known for their isolationist policy during the early years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. They produced [[Karakan gauntlets]], sophisticated medical devices that monitored and adjusted biological indicators such as nervous impulses, blood pressure, and tension. The [[Gauntlet/Legends|gauntlets]] were compatible with a number of different species.

==History==
[[File:Karakan_Gauntlets.png|thumb|200px|[[Karakan gauntlets]]]]
During the early period of the Galactic Republic, circa [[3956 BBY|3956]]<ref name="KOTOR" />–[[3951 BBY]],<ref name="KOTORII">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref> the Karakan were an isolationist group. However, one of their medical products, [[Karakan gauntlets]], could be acquired in parts of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at this time. The heavy [[Gauntlet/Legends|gauntlets]] monitored the nervous impulses, blood pressure, and tension of the wearer through contact with their hands. The gauntlets were then able to adjust these life signs and produce an overall increase in stability and system integrity. This comprehensive package made the gauntlets virtually a complete medical computer in themselves, producing many benefits to the user. They were compatible with the physiologies of [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]], [[Human/Legends|Humans]], [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]], [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]],<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[Miraluka/Legends|Miraluka]], and [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabraks]].<ref name="KOTORII" />

The [[Paaerduag]] merchant [[Mic'tunan'jus Orgu]] sold a pair of the gauntlets from his kiosk on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] which were colored yellow with green stripes.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Karakan were created for ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a [[Star Wars video games|computer roleplaying game]] produced by [[BioWare]] in [[2003]]. They never appear in the game but are mentioned in the description of the Karakan Gauntlets, which are also available in the sequel, ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', produced in [[2004]]. The item description is also included in the two [[Prima Games]] strategy guides and ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.

It is not clear whether the Karakan are a [[Species/Legends|species]], a culture, or an organization. Most gauntlets in the game are named after species—for instance, the [[Bothan precision gloves]], [[Gamorrean gauntlets]], [[Kubaz scoundrel gloves]], [[Nagai combat gloves]], and [[Nikto soldier gloves]]. Others, however, are named after planets such as the [[Taris survival gloves]] and [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] [[Accuracy gloves]]. Until [[canon]] clarification, this article treats them as a generic organization.
